reason: Agent successfully received message, processed it, and responded with correct answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260505-172955-7k2q" in sidebar — Agent page loaded, status displayed as "idle"
Verified agent status — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in top right corner
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into input field — Message entered successfully, send button became enabled
Clicked send button — Message sent, agent status changed to "working", new session "Basic Math Question Session" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded within approximately 1 second with answer "4"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly shows "4" as the agent's answer, screenshot captured
